description_long: This is a rectangular box of snacks, likely made of cardboard, with a printed exterior. The front face features a prominent product name and an image of the snack, which appears to be a type of crispbread or cracker, accompanied by a serving suggestion with vegetables. The sides of the box display additional branding and possibly nutritional or ingredient information. The back of the box is covered with detailed text, likely including nutritional facts, ingredients, and manufacturer details. The color palette is primarily white with green and brown accents, giving it a fresh and natural appearance. The box is compact and lightweight, suitable for being carried or placed on a shelf.
description: A compact rectangular cardboard snack box with a white, green, and brown printed design, featuring product branding and food imagery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main branding, product name, and an image of the snack with a serving suggestion.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a narrow face with some text and color accents, likely brand or product details.
description_view_2: Back view displays dense text, probably nutritional facts and ingredients, with minimal graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with text and color accents, possibly additional product information.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the front upper left of the box, consisting of stylized text in dark color on a white background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box shows an image of crispbread or crackers with vegetables, suggesting a savory or plain flavor, but no explicit flavor text is visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutritional facts panel and ingredient list are visible on the back of the box, with detailed text.
